text:
In the first scene, I feel a mixture of anticipation and slight nervousness. The atmosphere is one of transition—people gather, conversations begin, and a space beyond glass awaits us, lit with the promise of ideas shared. I am curious about what is to come, noticing the subtle tension between stillness and movement.

In the second scene, surrounded by vivid colors and thought-provoking displays, I feel a sense of wonder and connection to history. The words on the wall invite reflection; I am reminded of humanity’s drive to innovate and seek meaning. It is comforting and inspiring to stand at the intersection of past achievements and future possibilities.
